headline: Iran Update: 10 Days In, Trump Says Iran War Could End 'Very Soon'
summary: President Trump said the war with Iran could end very soon

reactions.quote: Trump orders U.S. strikes on Iranian military targets, world leaders react, and the Iranian people celebrate. Join live for a full recap of what unfolded, why it matters, and what will happen next.

If something in the USA and/or Israel explodes, before you rush to the Mossad false flag explanation, consider that in Iranian culture, it is considered traditional to bomb countries you are at war with.

Trump : we stand with the brave iranian people fighting oppression

People : so iranians in the us with asylum claims will b-

Trump : deported, yes
With polls decidedly against a war with Iran, insiders suggest that Trump is attempting to negotiate. Is it too late? Wendy Sherman and @camanpour.bsky.social discuss.
Why did the Trump administration's drive-by negotiations with Iran fall apart? Wendy Sherman and @camanpour.bsky.social compare the work on the 2015 Iran Nuclear Deal with this year's failed talks.

Where does the Trump administration's "might makes right" military action leave the Iranian people? @camanpour.bsky.social and Wendy Sherman look at how we got here and what comes next on an all-new podcast.
As the Trump administration creates chaos in Iran, Jon welcomes @camanpour.bsky.social and Wendy Sherman to make sense of the situation. New podcast drops tomorrow.
Despite Agent Orange claiming the Iran war is "complete," it appears they're about to send in ground troops.

The Peace President has launched a war. The affordability President is seeing historic oil & gas price spikes. The jobs President just lost 92,000 jobs in February. And he might "lose" his own "regime change" war as Iran has just appointed the Ayatollah's son the new Supreme Leader.

It doesn't seem Trump will "win" this war, and meanwhile he has CRUSHED the economy, with reports that people are screaming about gas prices in the White House. Look for Trump to back off as he fears total destruction in November, of course insisting that "we won the war."
Trump has crashed the market, spiked oil & gas and we're approaching 10 dead troops and it increasingly seems the Iranian regime is going to survive.
Karoline says Trump's Iran war will be great for oil and energy prices. Gas prices just increased to the highest they've been this term, but sure! (She has no idea how anything works)
Trump just said that if your cost of living goes up because he bombed Iran, it's worth it. Remember when he ran on LOWERING prices…and remember when people fell for it?

Fmr Trump spokesman: "Let's be consistent."

BTC: "I am being consistent-- that's the problem. I watched Trump on the campaign trail disparage all these other politicians who engaged in wars in the Middle East. And yet here we are. We have dead Americans, rising oil prices, and a war with no plan."

Trump admin: IT'S THE DEPARTMENT OF WAR NOW. WE ARE NOT AFRAID OF WAR. THE DAYS OF BITCH ASS DEMOCRATS WHO ARE AFRAID TO SAY WAR ARE OVER. ITS WAR YOU PUSSIES.

Also Trump admin: We are engaged in a limited military incursion with Iran-- something of an armed conflict or perhaps temporary operation.

"Every gun that is made, every warship launched, every rocket fired signifies, in the final sense, a theft from those who hunger and are not fed, those who are cold and are not clothed."
      - President Dwight D. Eisenhower
